During the validation procedure, an IDLE parameter server, which has finished its current epoch training and is waiting for other parameter servers, will be assigned as the validating parameter server

question: In the context of distributed machine learning, what role does the validation server play during the model validation procedure after completing the aggregation of the global model?

options.A: The validation server aggregates a new global model by averaging the top-K best local models.
options.B: The validation server distributes tasks of model validation to various external servers for efficiency.
options.C: The validation server calculates the precision and recall for the new global model using external datasets.
options.D: The validation server initiates a new round of training for all parameter servers involved.

explanation: According to the provided context, during the validation procedure, an IDLE parameter server (assigned as the validating parameter server) aggregates a new global model by averaging the top-K best local models. This role involves integrating multiple local models to form a more robust global model, rather than calculating performance metrics, distributing tasks, or initiating new training rounds.
